nasb.text: indeed, we had the sentence of death within ourselves so that we would not trust in ourselves, but in God who raises the dead;

esv.text: Indeed, we felt that we had received the sentence of death. But that was to make us rely not on ourselves but on God who raises the dead.

cnv.text: 而且斷定自己是必死的了；然而，這正是要我們不倚靠自己，只倚靠那叫死人復活的　神。

ccb.text: 我们心里觉得必死无疑，这使我们不倚靠自己，只倚靠使死人复活的上帝。

csbs.text: 然而我们在自己里面已经承受了死亡的判决，好让我们不依靠自己，而依靠那使死人复活的神。
